underlying_goal: Debug and fix production issues in a task orchestration system, then plan architectural refactoring via Trello cards
friction_detail: Test setup used wrong column name (schema_blueprint_id instead of proper pivot relationship), requiring several iterations to fix.
brief_summary: User debugged two production bugs (sync vs syncWithoutDetaching, non-deterministic schema hashing), reviewed data duplication, and created detailed Trello cards for architectural refactoring — all successfully completed.
